question: Show the names of regions that have more than one building.
sql: SELECT r.Name FROM building b JOIN region r ON b.Region_ID = r.Region_ID GROUP BY b.Region_ID HAVING COUNT(b.Building_ID) > 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找有多个建筑的地区名称

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求显示有多个建筑的地区名称，SQL反向翻译描述中的意图、表、列、分组和聚合均与原始问题匹配。
